commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR derives stale Skill Workshop proposal status during list and inspect reads for create targets that already exist or update targets that are missing, and adds service regression tests for the list path.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +68. Total +167 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's list and inspect paths read stored proposal status without target-state reconciliation, and the PR body includes a before/after terminal script showing pending becoming stale after a manual target skill install.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the unused helper/comment drift and refresh validation without changing the maintainer product direction.

target.title: fix(skills): reconcile stale workshop proposals when target skill exists or is missing
target.author: chengzhichao-xydt
